account.title: Data protection
account.body: This acceptance is recorded with the document version to secure your account and our transparency obligations.
account.checkbox: I have read and accept the
account.error: You must accept the terms and privacy policy to create an account.

health.title: Fitness and health data consent
health.body: BodyOps will process sensitive or health-adjacent data to personalize your programs, nutrition, progress tracking, and AI recommendations. You can withdraw this consent or delete your data from settings.

items.body: Body measurements, weight, height, progress, and photos if you add them.
items.goals: Fitness goals, level, physical constraints, and declared injuries.
items.nutrition: Food preferences, restrictions, meals, and nutrition targets.
items.ai: Context sent to AI only to generate personalized guidance.

health.accept: I accept the processing of my fitness/health data

socialNotice.prefix: By continuing with a social provider, you accept the

privacy.title: Privacy policy
privacy.metaDescription: How BodyOps collects, uses, and protects your personal data under GDPR, CNIL guidance, and PIPEDA.

identity.data: Name, first name, email, profile picture, language, country or region when available.
identity.purpose: Create the account, secure access, personalize the experience, and display the correct member/coach space.

body.data: Age, gender, weight, height, measurements, progress photos if added.
body.purpose: Calculate indicators, nutrition targets, progress, and personalized recommendations.

goals.data: Fitness goal, level, availability, equipment, training frequency, and body focus.
goals.purpose: Generate and adapt coherent training programs.

health.data: Declared injuries, areas to protect, recovery, sleep, hydration, heart rate, or Apple Health data if enabled.
health.purpose: Reduce unsuitable recommendations, improve tracking, and respect declared limits.

nutrition.data: Meals, foods, calories, macros, allergies, restrictions, preferences, and user-created foods.
nutrition.purpose: Track nutrition, suggest targets, and improve meal planning.

training.data: Sessions, exercises, loads, sets, reps, cardio, velocity tracking, and bar path tracking if used.
training.purpose: Track performance, history, progress, and execution quality.

coach.data: Coach/member notes, appointments, availability, messages, and data visible to the coach depending on context.
coach.purpose: Enable coaching, scheduling, follow-up, and communication.

ai.data: Messages, sport context, goals, useful history, and enabled AI settings.
ai.purpose: Generate replies, programs, analyses, summaries, and personalized recommendations.

payments.data: Customer identifiers, subscription status, and billing information processed by the payment provider.
payments.purpose: Manage subscriptions, invoices, trials, and premium access.

login.data: Firebase identifier, sign-in provider, verified email, session tokens, technical security logs.
login.purpose: Authenticate the user, prevent unauthorized access, and maintain service security.

who.title: 1. Who are we?
who.body: BodyOps is a fitness coaching, nutrition, progress tracking, and AI assistant application. For data collected in the application, BodyOps acts as data controller under GDPR. This policy also explains our transparency and meaningful-consent commitments for Canadian users under PIPEDA.

data.title: 2. Data collected
data.intro: We apply data minimization: the data below is collected only when it is necessary for the service, provided by the user, or enabled through an integration.

legalBasis.title: 3. Legal basis
legalBasis.intro: Depending on the processing, BodyOps relies on:
legalBasis.consent: Explicit consent — especially for fitness/health data, connected integrations, and some AI features.
legalBasis.contract: Performance of the service — account creation, authentication, programs, nutrition, messaging, appointments, and tracking.
legalBasis.legitimate: Legitimate interest — security, abuse prevention, technical improvement, and aggregated/anonymized statistics where possible.

sensitive.title: 4. Fitness/health data
sensitive.body: Data related to the body, nutrition, injuries, activity, recovery, and connected devices may be sensitive. BodyOps processes it only to provide the requested service, with explicit consent during onboarding, and does not use it for targeted advertising.

ai.title: 5. AI processing
ai.body: When you use the AI assistant or program generation, BodyOps may send an AI provider the minimum necessary context: goal, level, constraints, useful history, and the message you submit. AI replies are informational and do not replace a healthcare professional or qualified coach.

coachSharing.title: 6. Data visible to a coach
coachSharing.body: If you choose a coach or are followed by a coach, some tracking data may be visible to that coach: sport profile, goals, notes, appointments, messages, progress, training, and nutrition. The data is used for coaching and must not be reused outside BodyOps without your agreement.

processors.title: 7. Processors and third-party services
processors.body: BodyOps uses technical providers for authentication, hosting, database, payments, security emails, AI services, and connected integrations. These providers process data only to provide their services to BodyOps, under their own security and privacy safeguards.

international.title: 8. Transfers outside your country
international.body: Some providers may process data outside your country of residence, including the United States, Canada, or the European Union. Where needed, BodyOps relies on contractual safeguards, security measures, and strict limitation of transferred data.

retention.title: 9. Data retention
retention.body: Account data is kept while the account is active. After account deletion, BodyOps deletes or anonymizes personal data within a reasonable period, unless required for legal obligations, security, disputes, or temporary backups. Technical logs are kept for a limited period.

sharing.title: 10. Data sharing
sharing.body: BodyOps does not sell personal data. Data may be shared with a selected coach, technical processors, authorities where legally required, or a payment provider to manage the subscription. Data is not shared for advertising purposes.

rights.title: 11. Your rights
rights.body: You may request access, correction, export, deletion, restriction, objection, or withdrawal of consent. European users may exercise GDPR rights. Canadian users may request access, correction, and information about processing practices under PIPEDA.

security.title: 12. Security
security.body: BodyOps applies technical and organizational measures: HTTPS, Firebase authentication, secure sessions, restricted access, account deletion, server-side secret handling, and minimization of exposed data. No security is absolute, but the measures are adapted to the sensitivity of the data.

breach.title: 13. Security incident
breach.body: In the event of an incident involving personal data, BodyOps assesses the risk, documents the event, and notifies users or competent authorities where required by law, including in cases of real risk of significant harm in Canada or risk to rights and freedoms in Europe.

cookies.title: 14. Cookies and local storage
cookies.body: BodyOps uses cookies or storage strictly necessary for authentication, security, preferences, theme, language, and application functionality. No third-party advertising cookies are used without separate consent.

children.title: 15. Minors
children.body: BodyOps is not intended for children. The minimum age entered in the application is 13. If parental authorization is required in your country, it must be obtained before using the service.

canada.title: 16. Users in Canada
canada.body: In line with PIPEDA principles, BodyOps provides understandable information about collected data, purposes, third parties, available choices, and reasonably foreseeable consequences. You may contact us for any privacy question or complaint.

contact.title: 17. Contact
contact.body: For any question about data protection, use the application settings or contact BodyOps support. If you are in Europe, you may also contact your data protection authority. In Canada, you may contact the Office of the Privacy Commissioner of Canada.

terms.title: Terms of Use
terms.metaDescription: Terms of use for the BodyOps application.

service.title: 1. Service overview
service.body: BodyOps is an AI-assisted fitness coaching application. It provides training programs, nutrition plans, and personalized progress tracking, available from a web browser or installable mobile app.
service.age: BodyOps is reserved for users who are at least 13 years old. By creating an account, you confirm that you meet this requirement.

warning.title: 2. Warning — AI is not a professional coach
warning.body: The BodyOps AI assistant is a tool that helps plan training and nutrition. It does not replace a certified fitness coach, nutritionist, or healthcare professional.
warning.medical: Consult a doctor before starting an intensive program if you have a medical history.
warning.indicative: Generated recommendations are indicative and based on the data you provide.
warning.liability: BodyOps accepts no responsibility for injury caused by poor execution or unsuitable follow-up.

account.title: 3. Account creation and responsibility
account.body: You are responsible for the accuracy of the information entered during registration. Incorrect data may lead to unsuitable recommendations. Each account is strictly personal.

intellectualProperty.title: 4. Intellectual property
intellectualProperty.body: All application content is the exclusive property of BodyOps or its providers. Any reproduction, distribution, or modification without written permission is prohibited.

liability.title: 5. Limitation of liability
liability.body: BodyOps cannot be held responsible for direct or indirect damage related to using the application, including physical injuries, nutrition calculation errors, or service interruptions.

changes.title: 6. Changes to the terms
changes.body: BodyOps reserves the right to modify these terms at any time. Users will be notified by email or in-app notification.

contact.title: 7. Contact
contact.body: For any question about these terms, use the contact page available from the application settings.
